title: Harden Studio session boundary ownership
goal: Ensure session UI interactions pass through store-owned APIs and preserve architectural boundaries.

steps.text: Identify view-level calls that bypass store API boundaries.
Refactor interactions to route through store-level methods without changing behavior.
Verify view purity and ownership constraints remain intact.
Run targeted tests and summarize architectural risk changes.

acceptanceCriteria: No direct view-to-feature-model internal coupling remains in target scope
No IO is introduced into view layer

verification.text: Review boundary diff for scope creep
